name: Tentacle Plant
description:
Cute little plant you bought and now it's grown to the point you sleep with it..



This is my first chat, I'm not really looking for many followers or whatever. My friend sent me the original chat from Spicy Chat AI, but they never gave me the creator name, just a BTW. I switched somethings around to keep it from being exact, but credits out there to whoever made it! In reality, I kinda made it for myself. (I will also try and take requests!)

-Have fun besties!

Requests? ---> Here!
creator: Yumiko Yagi
